arts.ttl: What Abdukodir Khusanov did after debut errors shows he can be a success at Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City took on Chelsea in the Premier League as new signings Omar Marmoush and Abdukodir Khusanov made their full debuts.

arts.ttl: Sunday briefing: Salah nets landmark Liverpool goal and Man City bounce back
arts.sum: The Reds continue to set the pace, but Arsenal are not giving up the chase, while Manchester United will return to domestic action on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man United enquire over shock loan move for Chelsea star Christopher Nkunku - as Blues prepare bid for Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Nkunku, who has scored 13 goals, has struggled to dislodge Nicolas Jackson in attack, while Cole Palmer's form has prevented the 27-year-old from playing in attacking midfield.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Man United consider loan deal for Chelsea's Nkunku
arts.sum: Reports continue to link Chelsea's Christopher Nkunku with a move to Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca needs a better No 1 goalkeeper than Robert Sanchez if Chelsea want to win the biggest prizes, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Chelsea will always create chances and score goals. The reason they haven't been able to sustain a title challenge is that they lack experience and leadership at the other end.

arts.ttl: Maresca insists Chelsea ‘making progress’ despite wretched Premier League form
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca says that his team are still “making progress” after losing to Manchester City in the Premier League. The Blues were the better side in the first half of their encounter at the Etihad Stadium after Noni Madueke capitalised on an error from debutant Abdukodir Khusanov to put the visitors in front. […] The post Maresca insists Chelsea ‘making progress’ despite wretched Premier League form first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Nkunku GOING, wonderkid deal CONFIRMED, Mudryk BOMB
arts.sum: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Nkunku GOING, wonderkid deal CONFIRMED, Mudryk BOMB Christopher Nkunku will leave Chelsea before the end of the window, with renewed reports linking the attacker to Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola praises ‘amazing’ City reaction to going behind in Chelsea win
arts.sum: Josko Gvardiol, Erling Haaland and Phil Foden secured victory for the hosts.

arts.ttl: Why Pep Guardiola didn't speak to Man City signing Abdukodir Khusanov after debut
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola offered his full support to Manchester City debutant Abdukodir Khusanov after his errors on debut, even if he hasn't spoken to the defender himself.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports make an awkward apology to Man City live on air after Tim Sherwood's contentious comment before Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Sky Sports issued an awkward apology to Man City on Gillette Soccer Saturday after Tim Sherwood made some controversial comments regarding their transfer business.
